title: 18 Wheels Across India
desc: When Dawid departs from Kochi, he heads to Goa for his next assignment. While there, he explores the local fish market, and more.

title: Dual Survival Colombia
desc: Two survivalists navigate Colombia's wild jungles and mountains, demonstrating techniques to endure harsh conditions, from finding food to braving dangerous environments.

title: Man Vs. Wild
desc: Bear navigates Ireland's rugged terrain, scaling 2000ft cliffs, building fires, and foraging for food, and feasting on the carcass of a dead sheep.

desc: A wild adventure series where survivalist Matt embarks on rugged journeys, hunting, cooking, and experiencing nature's raw challenges.

desc: Exploring Latin America's wilds, adventurers navigate danger, survival tactics, and teamwork in untamed landscapes.

title: Naked And Afraid
desc: Two complete strangers - a man and a woman - are stripped of clothes and dropped into brutal wilderness for 21 days to survive using only wits and one personal item.
